adaptive_nemesis.configuration.title: Adaptive Nemesis Configs
adaptive_nemesis.config.title: Adaptive Nemesis
adaptive_nemesis.config.subtitle: Adaptive Difficulty Balance System
adaptive_nemesis.config.saved: Config modified, will be saved automatically
adaptive_nemesis.config.scroll_hint: Use mouse wheel to scroll for more options
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.difficul: Base value of overall difficulty multiplier, higher means stronger enemies
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.area_syn: Range to detect nearby players (in chunks)
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.enable_e: Whether to limit the maximum enhancement multiplier of enemies
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.max_heal: Maximum health enhancement multiplier for enemies
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.max_dama: Maximum damage enhancement multiplier for enemies
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.max_armo: Maximum armor enhancement multiplier for enemies
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.enable_t: High armor players will receive armor-ignoring true damage
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.low_armo: Base armor threshold, true damage calculation starts above this value
Base true damage percentage at low armor
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.turtle_t: Maximum true damage percentage at ultra-high armor
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.enable_b: Limit player's damage per attack to Boss
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.boss_hea: Extra health multiplier for Boss relative to normal enemies
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.boss_dam: Extra damage multiplier for Boss relative to normal enemies
Entity IDs excluded from boss damage cap (comma-separated), e.g.: minecraft:zombie,minecraft:skeleton
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.enable_n: Provide protection for players with short playtime
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.enable_r: Make enemy attributes randomly fluctuate for more diversity
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.fix_spee: Prevent enemies from moving too fast
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.random_m: Minimum factor for attribute random distribution
Maximum factor for attribute random distribution
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.enable_d: Let monster strength change smoothly instead of instantly matching player power. Enjoy the power trip after upgrades!
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.difficul: How many ticks between smoothing updates (20 ticks = 1s)
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.enable_w: Killing bosses (Ender Dragon/Wither/Warden) permanently increases world difficulty
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.world_st: Difficulty multiplier increment per world stage (0.5 = +50%)
Maximum world stage cap to prevent infinite growth
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.defense_: Weight of defense attribute in strength evaluation
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.damage_w: Weight of damage attribute in strength evaluation
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.apotheos: Weight of Apotheosis attribute in strength evaluation
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.irons_sp: Weight of Iron's Spells attribute in strength evaluation
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.epic_fig: Weight of Epic Fight attribute in strength evaluation
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.enable_d: Output detailed debug information to console
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.enable_v: Output more detailed debug information, including each calculation step
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.debug_lo: Also output debug logs to a file
Path to save debug log file (relative to game directory)
adaptive_nemesis.config.tooltip.log_outp: Control log verbosity: OFF, ERROR, WARN, INFO, DEBUG
